## Summary

- Describe the change clearly.

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated tests or verified why tests are not needed.
- [ ] I updated documentation or examples when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added a changeset for publishable package changes.
- [ ] I verified package builds still pass locally.

## Validation

- Explain what you ran and what you checked.

## Risks

- Call out breaking changes, migration concerns, or deployment impact.
